metadata.schedule_note: GitHub workflow is intended to run about every 8 hours.
metadata.query_scope_note: RF011g fetches CONUS once without subdiv1, then writes a California subset using CoCoRaHS station-number prefixes.

query.api_rows_scope_note: California feed is filtered from the CONUS API rows using stationNumber prefix CA-.

metadata.caveat: Volunteer-reported daily observations; use as supplemental screening and storm-verification context.

Temp: 61°; RH: 83%; Baro::29.859"r; Wind: 2-5 mph W; Sky/Clouds: OVC, BKN;  https://tempestwx.com/station/155002/

While we had some showery conditions during the day things really got going at around 5:15-5:30 pm, maybe a bit earlier.  I didn’t pay much attention because I thought it would just be another brief shower.  At about 5:40 was the first thunder, it was full-on rain.  It rained steadily until about 8:30, many bits of lightning and thunder, a couple rattling the house!

Freak cell that was not in the forecast today dropped some rain very quickly. The cell was just a blip on local radar. Readings at the time were 53°, 88%, 29.96”-S, 0mph. Dark overcast skies again this morning at the end of this period. Forecast now showing more of the same short duration rain for Thurs night (tonight) into early Fri morning.
rain started about 8 on and off all night.  Clear sky and no valley fog.
